xai.note: Legacy cap — news_monitor.py archived 2026-04-23. Kept for any future xAI-using daemons.

perplexity.note: Legacy cap — news_monitor.py archived 2026-04-23 (Apr 23 $100 incident). NEVER use Perplexity for code (CLAUDE.md rule).

anthropic.note: Hard-coded in shared_gates.py _ANTHROPIC_DAILY_LIMIT (added 2026-04-25). Caps Haiku NC scans + ad-hoc reasoning calls. 500/day = ~$1.50/day max. Cache + 60s error cooldown protect within budget.

gemini.note: Hard-coded in gemma4_helper.py _GEMINI_DAILY_LIMIT (added 2026-04-25). Currently only deep-verify auto-call uses it; cap is plenty of headroom.

ai_consensus.gemini:
**Reasoning:** 20 active timers but 0 projected calls means the static analyzer is blind. Caps are implemented in specific files (`shared_gates.py`), not at the global API-key level. *Forecast if wrong:* If caps are actually global, the risk is merely unexpected bot downtime; if I am right, you face infinite unbounded spend.

**(a) Runaway:** Gemini lacks Anthropic’s 60s error cooldown; a failing "deep-verify" will rapid-fire loop uncontrollably. 
**(b) Missing Caps:** Any new daemon failing to import `shared_gates.py` or `gemma4_helper.py` bypasses all limits.
**(c) 2x Blow-up:** Un-gated Perplexity calls. If hidden timers trigger it at 2x expected rate, you repeat the unbounded "$100 incident".
**(d) Unseen Burn:** The 20 untracked timers. Operators see a $0.00 projection, so actual bill
ai_consensus.anthropic:
{'answer': '# Blow-Up Risk Audit

**(a) Runaway loops:** 20 timers discovered but `projected.calls_per_day = 0` across all four providers — auditor sees nothing because timer→provider mapping is broken. A loop firing every 60s = 1,440 calls/day would silently bypass detection. The "LOW" risk rating is false-negative.

**(b) Missing caps:** Anthropic 500/day and Gemini 100/day are hard-coded in `shared_gates.py` / `gemma4_helper.py` — but **per-minute/burst caps absent**. A retry storm hits the daily cap in seconds. xAI (50) and Perplexity (20) caps are flagged "Legacy" post-`news_monitor.py` archival 2026-04-23 — if any new daemon imports the xAI client, no enforcement path is guaranteed.

**(c) 2× rate blow-up:** Anthropic worst case 1,000 Haiku calls ≈ $3/day (tolerable). Perplexit
ai_consensus.grok:
**Blow-up risks:**

(a) Runaway-loop: trading bot error/retry loops bypass Anthropic's 60s cooldown, easily exceeding 500 calls/day.  
(b) Missing daily caps: xAI & Perplexity rely on archived news_monitor.py legacy gates (50 & 20); new bot code has zero enforcement.  
(c) 2x rate: Perplexity jumps from 0→40 calls, repeating the Apr 23 $100 blow-up.  
(d) Perplexity is most likely to burn silently — banned for code (CLAUDE.md) yet has no active monitoring or hard gate in the live bot.

Overall risk far higher than "LOW" once bot launches.
